subMetadata.title: Made in Taiwan {subName} Brands | {categoryName} | MIT Map
subMetadata.description: Discover Made in Taiwan {subName} brands in {categoryName}, featuring local design and quality products worth supporting.

descriptions.fashion: Taiwan clothing brands stand out for textile expertise built through decades of mills, dye houses, and technical fabric suppliers. Designers pair that manufacturing base with practical cuts, climate-aware materials, and a sharp contemporary point of view. You will find everyday essentials, outdoor-ready layers, and independent labels with global ambitions. Formoria highlights fashion shaped by both craft know-how and modern Taiwanese life.
descriptions.bags-accessories: Taiwan bag brands often grow from a deep leather-working tradition and the island's practical manufacturing culture. Many workshops combine hand finishing, precise stitching, recycled fabrics, vegan leather, or other sustainable materials. The result is gear made for commuting, travel, and daily use without losing character. On Formoria, visitors can discover artisan studios, small-batch makers, and design-led labels refining how a bag should work.
descriptions.jewelry: Taiwan jewelry brands blend traditional metalwork with contemporary design, creating pieces that range from minimalist everyday accessories to bold statement works. Many makers source natural gemstones, freshwater pearls, and recycled metals, often combining hand finishing with modern techniques. Formoria showcases earrings, necklaces, rings, and bracelets from independent designers who bring personal artistry to wearable form.
descriptions.beauty: Taiwan beauty brands combine herbal wisdom, ingredient transparency, and cosmetic science tuned for humid subtropical weather. Formulas often focus on lightweight hydration, gentle repair, sun care, and calming botanicals suited to daily routines. Many labels use local plants, mineral springs, biotech actives, or clean manufacturing standards. Formoria introduces skincare, haircare, body care, and makeup brands that connect natural materials with precise modern formulation.
descriptions.home: Taiwan home brands bring together ceramics, woodworking, bamboo weaving, metal craft, and compact urban living design. Makers often create objects that are modest in footprint but rich in material detail, from tableware and storage to lighting and decor. The category reflects both studio craft and the island's habit of making small spaces work beautifully. On Formoria, visitors can find practical pieces, heirloom-quality objects, and thoughtful designs for everyday rituals.
descriptions.food-drink: Taiwan food and drink brands reflect an island where Hoklo, Hakka, Indigenous, Japanese, and global influences meet. Subtropical farms supply fruit, grains, tea, spices, and seafood, while many makers work directly with growers or regional producers. From pantry staples to high-mountain oolong and specialty coffee, Formoria helps visitors trace these products back to local ingredients, family recipes, and new culinary ideas.
descriptions.crafts: Taiwan craft brands preserve artisanal traditions while giving them practical contemporary forms. Letterpress studios, ceramicists, textile artists, woodworkers, metalworkers, and leather artisans keep slow processes alive through small-batch production. Their work often carries local stories, temple culture, regional materials, or memories of older trades. On Formoria, visitors can discover handmade objects that connect cultural preservation with design for modern use.
descriptions.stationery: Taiwan stationery brands benefit from precision engineering, print expertise, and a lively maker culture. Fountain pens, notebooks, planners, stamps, handmade paper, and desk tools often combine reliable function with expressive illustration or typography. Many makers work with local printers, paper mills, and independent artists. Formoria gathers writing and paper goods that show how Taiwan turns small tools into objects of care, creativity, and daily pleasure.
descriptions.tech: Taiwan tech brands are shaped by the island's semiconductor ecosystem, engineering talent, and world-class hardware supply chains. Consumer electronics, creator tools, peripherals, smart home devices, and specialist components often show a strong balance of reliability, usability, and production quality. Many teams can move from prototype to manufacturing with unusual speed. Formoria helps visitors find technology brands that turn Taiwan's industrial depth into products for everyday users.
descriptions.outdoor: Taiwan outdoor brands draw on the island's dramatic mountain terrain, subtropical trails, and year-round camping culture. Gear designers create lightweight, durable equipment tested in local conditions — from high-altitude ridgelines to coastal campgrounds. Many brands emphasize handmade craftsmanship, sustainable materials, and repair-friendly design. Formoria showcases backpacks, camping gear, and climbing equipment made for real adventures.
descriptions.fitness: Taiwan fitness and sports brands combine functional design with the island's active lifestyle culture. From yoga mats and resistance equipment to performance apparel and recovery tools, makers focus on ergonomic detail and material quality. Many brands serve both gym-goers and outdoor athletes with products tested in Taiwan's humid climate. Formoria introduces fitness gear and sportswear brands that prioritize function, comfort, and durability.
descriptions.kids-pets: Taiwan kids and pet brands reflect a culture that values safety, gentle materials, and thoughtful design for the youngest family members and their animal companions. Organic cotton clothing, wooden toys, non-toxic accessories, and handmade pet gear are common across the category. Many makers hold international safety certifications and use locally sourced materials. Formoria gathers brands that bring care and creativity to products for children, babies, and pets.

metadata.title: Glossary
metadata.description: Definitions for terms used across Formoria — from what Made in Taiwan means to how trust badges work and how we organise the directory.

glossary.heading: Glossary
glossary.lede: Terms and definitions used across Formoria — from what 'Made in Taiwan' means to how trust badges work and how we organise the directory.

madeInTaiwan.definition: Primary design, manufacturing, or founding rooted in Taiwan — a commitment to craft, not just an origin label.

communityCurated.definition: Submitted and reviewed by the community, not by an algorithm — every listing reflects a human decision.

mitVerified.definition: Registry-confirmed against the MIT Smile Mark — independently cross-checked, not self-reported.

ownerClaimed.definition: The brand owner has claimed and actively manages this listing — a live, maintained presence.

communityLabel.definition: Community-maintained with no owner claim and no registry check — always welcome to claim.

leather.definition: Full- or top-grain, vegetable-tanned leather — not synthetics.

ceramic.definition: Clay, porcelain, and stoneware, with strong roots in Yingge heritage.

naturalFibre.definition: Cotton, linen, wool, silk, or bamboo — plant- or animal-sourced only.

midRange.definition: Considered purchases, from NT$1,000 to NT$5,000.

slowMade.definition: Small-batch and handmade — a curatorial signal, not a certification.

ecoConscious.definition: A material commitment to environmental responsibility in sourcing, packaging, and waste.

familyRun.definition: Family-owned and operated, often across multiple generations.

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Read Formoria's terms of service, including content ownership, data usage, brand review process, and disclaimer.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Thank you for using Formoria. By using this platform, you agree to the following terms. Please read carefully before submitting brand information.

contentOwnership.heading: Content Ownership
contentOwnership.body: Brand information you submit to Formoria (including name, description, images, links, etc.) must be content you legally own or have the right to use. By submitting, you grant Formoria a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display and promote the content on this platform for the purpose of showcasing Taiwanese brands.

dataUse.heading: Data Usage
dataUse.body: Brand data collected by Formoria is used solely to build the Taiwanese brand directory and provide brand discovery features. We do not sell your personal information or brand data to third parties. Data use is governed by these terms and our privacy policy.

reviewProcess.heading: Brand Review Process
reviewProcess.body: All submitted brand information is subject to manual review before being published. Formoria reserves the right to reject or remove any brand information that does not meet our platform standards, without liability to the submitter. Approval does not constitute endorsement or certification of the brand by Formoria.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Formoria provides this service as-is and makes no warranties regarding the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of content on the platform. Formoria is not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of this platform.

changes.heading: Changes to Terms
changes.body: Formoria reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be announced on the platform. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. If you have questions, please contact us via the contact page.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Learn how Formoria collects, processes, and uses your personal data in compliance with Taiwan's Personal Data Protection Act.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Formoria values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, process, and use your personal data in accordance with Taiwan's Personal Data Protection Act (個人資料保護法).

dataCollection.heading: Data Collection
dataCollection.body: When you use Formoria, we may collect the following personal data: email address and name (optional) when submitting a brand, brand name, official website URL, brand region, social links (Instagram, Threads, Facebook), purchase links, brand ownership status, and source attribution. When you create an account, we collect your email and authentication details through Supabase Auth. Additionally, we automatically collect anonymized browsing data (page views, events, anonymized IP addresses) through Google Analytics.

purpose.heading: Purpose of Use
purpose.body: We collect personal data for the following purposes: building and maintaining the Taiwan brand directory, providing brand discovery and search functionality, improving brand information quality through data enrichment, preventing spam and abuse, improving website functionality and user experience, and processing your brand submissions and account-related matters.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.body: To provide our service, we use the following third-party providers: Supabase (database and authentication, servers in the US), Google Analytics 4 (website analytics, data processed in the US), Sentry (error monitoring, data processed in the US), Cloudflare Turnstile (bot protection), and Railway (web hosting, servers in the US). We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Data is shared only to the extent necessary to provide our services.

userRights.heading: Your Rights
userRights.body: Under Article 3 of the Personal Data Protection Act, you have the right to: query or request access to your personal data, request a copy, request corrections or supplements, request cessation of collection, processing, or use, and request deletion. To exercise any of these rights, please contact privacy@formoria.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

dataProtection.heading: Data Protection
dataProtection.body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal data, including: HTTPS encryption across the entire site, access controls to restrict data access, and regular security reviews. Your brand data is retained for as long as the brand is listed in the directory. Account data is retained for the duration of your account. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

cookies.heading: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.body: This website uses Google Analytics 4 cookies to record page views and usage events, with IP addresses anonymized. We also use Cloudflare Turnstile session cookies for bot detection to protect forms from spam. This website does not use any advertising cookies or third-party tracking cookies.

changes.heading: Policy Changes
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your personal data rights, please contact: privacy@formoria.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days as required by the Personal Data Protection Act.

metadata.title: FAQ
metadata.description: Frequently asked questions about the Formoria Taiwanese brand directory — learn what Made in Taiwan means, how to submit a brand, the review process, and how to claim your brand page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: If you still have questions, feel free to reach out via the contact information at the bottom of the page.

whatIsFormoria.question: What is Formoria?
whatIsFormoria.answer: Formoria is a community-driven directory of Taiwanese brands dedicated to helping people discover and support quality Made in Taiwan products. Whether you're a consumer looking to explore local brands or a brand owner hoping to reach more people, Formoria is your starting point.

whatDoesMitMean.question: What does "MIT" mean?
whatDoesMitMean.answer: "MIT" stands for Made in Taiwan. The brands listed on Formoria are primarily manufactured in Taiwan — including brands that are designed, produced, or founded in Taiwan. We care not just about the origin label, but about the craftsmanship and story behind each brand.

howToSubmit.question: How do I submit a brand to Formoria?
howToSubmit.answer: Anyone can submit a brand using our submission form. Go to the Submit a Brand page, fill in the brand's basic information, official website, social media links, and more. Once submitted, the Formoria team will review the listing. There is no fee — we evaluate submissions based solely on quality and authenticity.

reviewTime.question: How long does the brand review take?
reviewTime.answer: In most cases, brand reviews take about 7 business days. During that time, our team verifies the brand's authenticity and its connection to Made in Taiwan. Once approved, the brand will appear in the directory. If the submission is incomplete, we may reach out by email to request additional information.

claimBenefits.question: Why claim a brand? What are the benefits?
claimBenefits.answer: Every listing on Formoria starts as a community label — accurate as far as the community knows, but unmanaged and often incomplete. Claiming is free and gives you direct control: edit your brand info, photos, and links, and your page earns a "managed by the brand" badge that builds visitor trust. Once you're established, upgrading unlocks a richer microsite, page analytics so you can see how shoppers find you, and featured placement in the directory.

claimOrUpdate.question: I'm the brand owner — how do I claim or update my brand page?
claimOrUpdate.answer: On the brand page, click "Claim this brand" and submit one proof of ownership (brand domain email, backend screenshot, or business registration document). Our team reviews claims promptly and emails you the result. Once approved, you can edit and publish changes from the Owner Dashboard at any time.

dataAccuracy.question: How is the accuracy of brand information ensured?
dataAccuracy.answer: Formoria collects brand information through community contributions and our admin team performs an initial review during the approval process. If you find any brand information that is incorrect or outdated, please let us know through our contact channel and we'll address it promptly.

isBrandFree.question: Is it free to list a brand on Formoria?
isBrandFree.answer: Yes, submitting a brand to Formoria is completely free. Our goal is to build a comprehensive directory of Made in Taiwan brands, and we welcome submissions from anyone — brand owners, fans, or community members.

editBrand.question: Can I edit a brand page after it's published?
editBrand.answer: Brand owners can claim their brand page to update information, add photos, and manage their listing. Visit the brand page and look for the claim option, or contact us for assistance.

whatCategories.question: What product categories does Formoria cover?
whatCategories.answer: Formoria covers twelve categories: Fashion & Apparel, Bags & Accessories, Jewelry, Beauty & Personal Care, Home & Living, Food & Beverage, Crafts & Art, Stationery & Design, Tech & Electronics, Outdoor & Camping, Sports & Fitness, and Kids Baby & Pets.

languageSupport.question: Is Formoria available in English?
languageSupport.answer: Yes, Formoria is fully bilingual in English and Traditional Chinese (zh-TW). You can switch languages using the language toggle in the navigation bar.

howVerified.question: How does brand verification work?
howVerified.answer: Brands on Formoria go through a review process to confirm they are genuinely Made in Taiwan. Brand owners can also claim and verify their pages for additional trust signals and editing access.

contact.question: How do I contact the Formoria team?
contact.answer: For any questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, please email: <mail>{email}</mail>. Our team typically responds within 2–3 business days.

metadata.title: About Formoria
metadata.description: Formoria helps quality Made-in-Taiwan brands get found through a community-curated directory built for discovery, craft, and care.

hero.title: A community built for Taiwan's brands
hero.subtitle: A community-curated directory for discovering quality Made-in-Taiwan brands, from everyday staples to thoughtful design.

origin.heading: Why Formoria Exists
origin.body1: For years abroad, I kept looking for the brands that made home feel close: familiar pantry staples, well-made daily goods, design objects, and small labels I trusted but could never quite explain to friends. So many independent brands already have the quality, the taste, the care — what they lack is a simple way to be found by the people already looking for them.
origin.body2: Portuguese sailors who sailed past Taiwan called it Ilha Formosa, the beautiful island. Formoria is the place that brings together the brands of this beautiful island worth treasuring.
origin.body3: On Formoria, MIT means a brand is founded, designed, produced, or deeply rooted in Taiwan. We look for real connection, considered quality, and a story worth helping more people discover.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.statement: Our mission is to help quality Made-in-Taiwan brands get found and put Taiwan on the map for design, craft, and care.

promote.heading: Promote Taiwanese Brands
promote.body: Make it easier for people around the world to discover Taiwanese brands with strong products, thoughtful stories, and a real connection to place.

smallBusiness.heading: Support Small Businesses
smallBusiness.body: Give independent makers, family businesses, and emerging labels another path to visibility without asking them to become something they are not.

platform.heading: Build a Discovery Platform
platform.body: Create a clean, trusted place where shoppers, travelers, editors, and diaspora communities can find Taiwan-made brands worth remembering.

taiwanStats.heading: Taiwan's economy is built by small brands.
taiwanStats.intro: Behind every brand in our directory is a small or medium business. In Taiwan, those businesses were never a side act.

employment.label: of the national workforce
employment.detail: Employed by SMEs — over 9.16 million people

taiwanStats.note: Together they generate over NT$28 trillion in annual sales — more than half of all enterprise revenue. Backing one Taiwan brand backs the everyday life of the island.
taiwanStats.sourceName: SME White Paper 2024, SME & Startup Administration, MOEA (2023 data)

guide.heading: Ready to use Formoria?
guide.body: Learn how to browse, save, submit, and manage brand listings.

trust.heading: How We Build Trust
trust.subtitle: Listings start as community contributions. When an owner steps forward with proof, they can manage their brand directly.

pillar1.title: Community-curated
pillar1.desc: Brands are discovered and shared by people who care about Taiwanese makers. These are real contributors, not automated bots.

pillar2.title: Owner-claimed
pillar2.desc: Brand owners submit business proof, such as a domain email, backend access, or official documents, to take ownership of their listing.

pillar3.title: Proof-reviewed
pillar3.desc: Every claim is reviewed by our team before the brand-managed badge is granted. No self-certification.

brandProfile.sectionVerificationHint: Verify your MIT Smile mark registration to help shoppers identify locally made products.
brandProfile.sectionReputationHint: Add press coverage, awards, and external references that strengthen brand credibility.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
boundary.brandDescription: We couldn't load this brand. Please try again.
boundary.guideDescription: We couldn't load this guide. Please try again.

metadata.title: Submit a Brand
metadata.description: Share your Taiwan-made brand with the community

overview.heading: Submit Your Taiwan Brand
overview.description: You can recommend a brand you love, or start the owner flow to claim and manage your own brand later.
overview.recommendDescription: Best for shoppers, fans, and friends. Just share the brand name and a URL so we can start reviewing it.
overview.recommendPoint1: Open to guests with no sign-in gate
overview.recommendPoint3: Approved brands are added to Formoria
overview.ownerDescription: Best for founders, operators, and brand teams. After approval, we’ll send the invitation to claim and manage the listing.
overview.ownerPoint1: Submit core brand details and representative links
overview.ownerPoint2: Complete the owner claim flow, and we’ll send an invitation after approval
overview.ownerPoint3: Use your dashboard to manage the brand page afterwards

wizard.heading: Submit a Brand
wizard.subheading: Share your Taiwan-made brand with the community

url.heading: Submit a brand you love
url.subheading: Share Taiwan-made brands with the community
url.label: Brand Website URL
url.hint: Paste the brand's website URL and we'll auto-fill your submission data
url.purchaseLinksHint: Add links where customers can buy this brand's products
url.ownerHint: We'll ask you to verify ownership. Once claimed, you can manage your brand page and update information.
url.howKnowBrand: How do you know this brand?
url.howKnowPlaceholder: Select how you know this brand (optional)
url.fetchError: Could not retrieve brand information. Please try again or fill in the form manually.

attribution.saw_at_market: Saw at a market or physical store

fields.heroImageHelper: Optional — if you provide an image we'll use it directly; if not, we'll search automatically (quality not guaranteed).
fields.heroImageDescription: Recommended: upload your brand logo or a representative product photo
fields.productPhotosHelper: Optional — up to 5 product photos to help us understand your brand better.
fields.brandDescriptionHint: Write a specific, factual description (at least 40 characters) — what you make, your materials, and what makes the brand Taiwanese.
fields.mitSmileMarkNumberHint: After verification, the brand page will show a MIT Smile certification tag.
fields.photosDragHint: Drag to reorder. The first photo becomes the hero image.
fields.noPhotos: No photos found from your website
fields.tagsHint: Add up to 5 tags to help people find your brand
fields.tagsInputPlaceholder: Type and press Enter to add a tag
fields.logoHint: Upload your brand logo (max 5MB, will be resized to max 1200px)
fields.productPhotosHint: Upload up to 6 photos to showcase your products
fields.brandHighlightsPlaceholder: e.g. Handcrafted with local Taiwanese cedar...
fields.purchaseLinksHint: Add links where people can buy your products
fields.purchaseLinkError: Please add at least one purchase link
fields.retailLocationsHint: Physical locations where your products are sold (optional)
fields.regionHint: The brand's headquarters or main city of operations
fields.productTypesHint: Select the product type that best describes your brand
fields.ubnHint: 8-digit number issued by the Ministry of Economic Affairs
fields.ubnDuplicateTitle: A brand with this UBN already exists in the directory
fields.nameDuplicateConfirmLabel: I confirm this is not a duplicate brand
fields.dedup_check_failed: Unable to check for duplicates. Please try again.

review.pdpaConsent: I agree to the collection and use of my personal data in accordance with the <privacyPolicy>Privacy Policy</privacyPolicy>, and understand my rights under the Personal Data Protection Act.

metadata.title: Submission Successful
metadata.description: We have received your brand submission and it is under review.

confirmation.heading: Thank you!
confirmation.communityOwnershipNotice: Because your account already manages a brand, this submission was accepted as a community listing and cannot be claimed by this account.
confirmation.communityOwnershipContinue: You can still proceed, and this submission will be treated as a community listing.

review.label: Under Review
review.description: Our team typically completes the review within 3 business days

ownerReview.label: Listing Review
ownerReview.description: We’ll review the listing details first to confirm the brand fits the directory.

result.label: Result Notification
result.description: Once reviewed, approved brands will appear in the Formoria directory. If you provided an email address, we'll notify you too.

ownerResult.label: Claim Invitation
ownerResult.description: If approved, we’ll send a claim invitation next, followed by the ownership-proof flow.

reviewTime.question: How long does review take?
reviewTime.answer: Our team typically completes reviews within 3 business days.

contact.question: How will I be contacted?
contact.answer: We'll reach out via the email address you provided.

afterApproval.question: What happens after approval?
afterApproval.answer: Your brand will appear in the Formoria directory for visitors to discover.

learnMore.question: Want to learn more?
learnMore.answer: Want to learn more about Formoria? Check out our <link>Getting Started guide</link>.

ownerLearnMore.question: What happens next?
ownerLearnMore.answer: Want to understand the claim and management flow? Read our <link>Getting Started guide</link>.

validation.nameMinLength: Brand name must be at least 2 characters
validation.descriptionMinLength: Brand description must be at least 40 characters
validation.tagsMax: You can select up to 5 tags
validation.heroImageRequired: Please upload a brand hero image
validation.photosMax: You can upload up to 6 photos
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.purchaseLinksMin: Please provide at least one purchase link
validation.pdpaRequired: Please agree to the privacy policy

errors.notAuthenticated: Please sign in before submitting a brand
errors.rateLimit: Too many submissions, please try again later.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred, please try again.
errors.turnstileError: Verification failed. Please refresh and try again.

recommendForm.heading: Recommend a Brand
recommendForm.subheading: Share the brand name and URL so we can review this Taiwan-made brand.
recommendForm.websiteHint: Paste the main website, storefront, or social homepage for the brand.
recommendForm.brandNameHint: Use the official brand name so we can verify it and avoid duplicates.
recommendForm.guestEmailHint: Leave an email if you’re open to follow-up questions from our team.
recommendForm.descriptionHint: If you know the brand story, products, or why it matters, add it here.
recommendForm.descriptionPlaceholder: For example: I bought their handmade furniture at a local design market…
recommendForm.sourceLabel: How do you know this brand?
recommendForm.sourceHint: This helps us understand the context behind the recommendation.
recommendForm.sourcePlaceholder: Select how you know this brand

ownerForm.heading: Owner Submission
ownerForm.subheading: Submit your brand details first. After approval, we’ll send the claim invitation.
ownerForm.websiteHint: Use your main website. We’ll use it as the anchor for review and later claim steps.
ownerForm.brandNameHint: Use the official public brand name. It will shape both the listing and the later claim flow.
ownerForm.romanizedNameHint: Used for your brand's URL (e.g. din-tai-fung)
ownerForm.urlPreviewHint: URL changes from dashboard edits are applied after review. Clearing the romanized name keeps the current URL.
ownerForm.descriptionHint: A short brand description helps us review and structure the listing faster.
ownerForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us what you make, why it’s made in Taiwan, and what defines the brand.
ownerForm.heroImageHintOwner: We recommend uploading the main visual or homepage hero image for the brand.
ownerForm.cityHint: Add the brand’s city so customers can discover local brands.
ownerForm.linksHint: Add your main social and buying links so the listing is easier to build after approval.

ownerFork.heading: Choose Your Submission Path
ownerFork.description: Pick the option that best fits your time and needs.
ownerFork.quickDescription: Provide basic info and let our system auto-enrich your brand details. Best for time-pressed founders.
ownerFork.quickPoint1: Only brand name, website, and description needed
ownerFork.quickPoint2: Our system auto-enriches your brand data
ownerFork.detailsDescription: Provide complete brand info to ensure accurate representation. Best for brand-conscious founders.
ownerFork.detailsPoint1: Full control over how your brand appears
ownerFork.detailsPoint2: Upload brand photos and product images
ownerFork.detailsPoint3: Add social links and sales channels

quickForm.heading: Quick Brand Submission
quickForm.subheading: Provide basic info — we'll auto-enrich the rest from your website.

submissionWizard.heading: Fill in Brand Details
submissionWizard.subheading: Complete each step to ensure your brand is accurately represented.

form.heading: Submit a Brand
form.subheading: Share your Taiwan-made brand with the community
form.brandNameHint: This will be used as the brand name. We also use it to search for brand information online, so accuracy is important.
form.isOwnerHint: We'll ask you to verify ownership. Once claimed, you can manage your brand page and update information.
form.sourceLabel: How do you know this brand?
form.sourcePlaceholder: Select how you know this brand

metadata.title: Explore Formoria
metadata.description: Learn how to browse Taiwan-made brands, save favorites, and follow official links to learn more.

hero.title: Find your next favorite brand
hero.intro: Browse Taiwan-made brands by category, values, location, and shopping channel. Open a listing to learn more, save it for later, or follow official links to shop.

discover.title: Start with what interests you
discover.body: Browse by category, values, location, or shopping channel to find brands that match your interests.

submit.title: Open a brand listing
submit.body: Read the brand story, products, photos, locations, and official links in one place.

review.title: Compare the details
review.body: Use descriptions, photos, and links to understand what makes each brand different.

manage.title: Save brands for later
manage.body: Keep brands you want to revisit in your saved list, then return when you are ready to learn more or shop.

tips.heading: While you browse
tips.accurate: Read the description and product details to understand what each brand offers.
tips.photos: Use product photos to get a feel for the brand's materials, style, and range.
tips.links: Follow official links to learn more or shop directly from the brand.

claim.title: Claim Your Brand
claim.description: If someone else submitted your brand, verify your ownership to manage the listing.

manage.title: Manage Your Listing
manage.description: Update products, links, and descriptions when details change.

track.title: Track Performance
track.description: See how visitors discover and interact with your brand.

cta.heading: Ready to explore Taiwan-made brands?
cta.body: Browse the directory to find brands that match your interests, or read the FAQ to learn how listings work.

dashboard.description: Review queues, brand data, and categorization status requiring action.
dashboard.newSubmissionsSub: Data enrichment must be complete before manual review.
dashboard.overviewSub: Quick metrics on site data and governance scope.
dashboard.newsletterSectionSub: Email capture list and subscription confirmation status.

stages.emptyReadyToReview: No brand submissions ready to approve.

stats.flaggedContentDesc: Flags in the content review queue

pendingEdits.title: Brand Edit Review
pendingEdits.submittedForReview: Your edit has been submitted for review
pendingEdits.brandEditSubmittedForReview: Your edit has been submitted for review

claimRequests.ownerAlreadyManagesBody: This requester already manages {brandName}. Reject this claim using the existing-owner reason.

rejectReasons.insufficientProof: The proof provided is insufficient to confirm you operate this brand.
rejectReasons.proofMismatch: The proof provided does not match this brand.
rejectReasons.emailUnverified: The email verification was not completed.
rejectReasons.alreadyClaimed: This brand has already been claimed by someone else.
rejectReasons.screenshotInsufficient: The backend screenshot does not demonstrate that you manage this brand.
rejectReasons.docMismatch: The business registration document does not match the brand or is illegible.
rejectReasons.proofInauthentic: The proof provided appears to have been edited or is not authentic.
rejectReasons.needMoreEvidence: The current proof is insufficient; please resubmit with additional supporting evidence.

submissions.title: Brand Submissions
submissions.description: Complete data enrichment before manual approval or rejection.

sourceAttribution.question: How do you know this brand?
sourceAttribution.saw_at_market: Saw at a market or event
sourceAttribution.work_there: Work there or know the team

submissions.claimNote: After approval, a brand claim invitation will be sent to the submitter; subsequent proof review will be handled in the claim requests queue.

emptyState.description: Adjust a condition or explore more brands for inspiration.

clearFilters.title: Clear filters
clearFilters.description: Keep the brand keyword and remove other filters

guides.metaDescription: Explore curated Taiwan brand guides, from skincare to food, and discover the best Made in Taiwan brands.
guides.heading: Taiwan Brand Guides
guides.subheading: Explore Taiwan brands, industries, and purchasing context. From daily skincare to local food, find the guides you are looking for.
guides.loadError: Guides are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Guide not found
notFound.description: The guide you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
